relations.subject: Chirruping nightjar
relations.evidence: It occurs in grassland, open woodland, forest with scrubby outcrops, farmland, riverbanks and dried riverbeds

relations.subject: Chirruping nightjar
relations.evidence: However, like most species in the Philippines, its population is still likely on the decline due to rapid urbanization and habitat degradation.{{Cite journal |last1=Cleere |first1=Nigel |last2=Boesman |first2=Peter F
